summary: The diff implements most of the requested Settings page requirements. A dedicated SettingsPage.tsx is created with Language, Version, Admin, About App, and Download sections. The route is registered in App.tsx, Settings is added to the sidebar (Layout.tsx moreItems) and BottomNav.tsx, the LanguageSelector is removed from the top nav, and admin visibility is gated by useIsCallerAdmin. One partial gap exists: REQ-5 requires links to both Privacy Policy and Copyright Policy pages plus contact/support info, but the truncated SettingsPage.tsx only confirms a Copyright link import — Privacy Policy link and contact/support info cannot be confirmed from the visible diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: About App section must include a link to Privacy Policy page and contact/support info, in addition to app name, description, and Copyright Policy link.
missing_requirements.reason: The truncated SettingsPage.tsx shows a Copyright import and link row, but there is no visible evidence of a Privacy Policy link or contact/support info being rendered in the About App section. The diff is truncated before the About App section content is shown.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'Build' row displaying a 'stable' release channel was added to the Version section.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 only requested a single 'App Version' label and version string as a read-only row. An additional 'Build / stable' row was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Settings link added to the authenticated user dropdown menu in Layout.tsx, in addition to the sidebar moreItems section.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-7 only requested Settings in the sidebar navigation and the bottom navigation bar. Adding it to the user dropdown menu was not requested.
